summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Nova AI iteration 6 - All major features working correctly. Backend: 32/32 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows tested and working.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (/api/)
Waitlist count endpoint returns count (currently 2)
User registration creates account and returns JWT token
Duplicate registration returns 400 error
Admin login with admin@nova.ai / admin123 works
Login with wrong password returns 401
GET /api/auth/me with valid token returns user data
GET /api/auth/me without token returns 401
Forgot password generates reset token for existing email
Forgot password for non-existent email returns success (no enumeration)
Reset password with valid token succeeds
Reset password with invalid token returns 400
Studio workflow CRUD - create, list, get, update, delete
Workflow endpoints require authentication
Linter scan - clean workflow gets certified (score >= 85)
Linter detects exposed API keys (score penalty)
Linter detects prompt injection patterns
Linter detects orphan nodes
Linter detects blacklisted domains
Marketplace search by query string
Marketplace search by category filter
Marketplace search by minimum trust score
Marketplace search sort by rating
Marketplace search pagination
Agent export returns workflow JSON
Agent export for non-existent agent returns 404
Agent export requires authentication
Creators have is_supernova field
Search results include creator_supernova field
Frontend Home page loads with waitlist counter showing 'X on the waitlist'
Frontend Login page has 3 modes: login, signup, forgot password
Frontend Login mode toggle buttons work correctly
Frontend Signup form creates account and auto-logs in
Frontend Forgot password flow generates reset token and shows reset form
Frontend Login redirects to /studio after successful login
Frontend Navbar shows 'Log out' for authenticated users
Frontend Studio page loads with all components (chat pane, canvas pane, code pane)
Frontend Studio Vibe Mode chat - messages persist and AI responds
Frontend Studio Node Mode - add nodes, nodes appear on canvas with edges
Frontend Studio Code pane shows JSON representation of workflow
Frontend Studio Deploy button saves workflow and runs linter
Frontend Studio Linter result shows trust score and status
Frontend Studio Workflow selector - create new, switch between workflows
Frontend Marketplace shows agents with Supernova badges for creators
Frontend Marketplace category filters visible

test_credentials.test_user: Created during testing with unique timestamps

seed_data_creation: Database already seeded with 6 agents, 5 creators, reviews, and 2+ waitlist entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 6 are working. Backend has comprehensive pytest tests in /app/backend/tests/test_nova_api.py. Studio Vibe Mode chat uses MOCKED AI responses (generateAssistantResponse function) - not real LLM integration. Supernova engine runs on startup and evaluates creators based on deploy count, rating, trust score, and reviews.

mocked_apis.Studio Vibe Mode AI chat: Uses local generateAssistantResponse function that creates nodes based on keywords like 'refund', 'sales', 'escalation', 'api'. This is NOT a real LLM integration - it's a deterministic pattern matcher.
